Welcome to LuminaReadThank you for choosing LuminaRead as your document viewer. This guide covers all the essential features, navigation methods, and tips that will help you work efficiently with your documents.Opening DocumentsClick the "Open" button in the top toolbar or use Ctrl+O to open a document. LuminaRead will parse and render it at high fidelity, preserving the original layout, fonts, and graphics. The document title appears in the top-right corner of the toolbar once loaded.
You can open a new document at any time

it will replace the currently viewed one. LuminaRead handles documents of any size, from single-page letters to multi-thousand-page manuals, with smooth performance.Page NavigationUse the arrow buttons in the bottom status bar to move between pages. The current page number and total count are always displayed between the navigation arrows. Navigation buttons automatically disable when you reach the first or last page of the document.Zoom ControlsFlexible zoom controls are located in the bottom status bar. Click "+" to zoom in, "

" to zoom out, and "1:1" to reset to the default level. The current zoom percentage is displayed between the controls. When zoomed in beyond the window size, click and drag to pan around the document.SearchPress Ctrl+F or click "Search" in the toolbar to open the search bar. Type your query and press Enter to find all matches across the entire document. Use the ">" and "<" buttons to navigate between results. Press Escape to dismiss the search bar. Search is case-insensitive and works across all pages simultaneously.Invert ModeFor comfortable reading in low-light environments or to reduce eye strain during extended sessions, click the "Invert" button in the toolbar to toggle color inversion. Dark backgrounds become light and vice versa

particularly useful for documents with white backgrounds when reading in dark environments.Rendering EngineLuminaRead uses a high-performance rendering engine built from the ground up for accuracy and speed. Documents are rendered at native resolution and scaled to your zoom level, ensuring crisp text and sharp graphics at any magnification. The engine handles complex vector graphics, embedded fonts, transparency, and high-resolution images. Rendering is asynchronous
the interface remains responsive even with complex pages.Keyboard Shortcuts  Ctrl + O                   Open a document
Right Arrow / Page Down    Next page
Left Arrow / Page Up       Previous page

Escape                     Close search barWindow LayoutLuminaRead maximizes on startup to give you the largest possible viewing area. The interface is divided into three main regions: the top toolbar (containing Open, Search, and Invert buttons along with the document filename), the central page view area where your documents are displayed, and the bottom status bar (page navigation, zoom controls, and zoom percentage).Performance TipsFor very large documents (1000+ pages), allow a moment for the initial parsing to complete. Zoom levels between 100

200% provide the best balance of readability and rendering performance. The search feature indexes pages on-demand, so the first search in a large document may take slightly longer. LuminaRead manages memory efficiently, keeping only nearby pages rendered at full quality.Supported FormatsLuminaRead is built to handle a broad range of document formats with high-fidelity rendering. The parsing engine processes documents at the structural level, ensuring accurate reproduction of the original layout, text positioning, and graphical elements regardless of complexity. Whether your document contains simple text, complex tables, embedded images, or multi-layer compositions, LuminaRead renders them faithfully.You are now ready to start using LuminaRead. Click "Get Started" below to begin.Get StartedPlease scroll to the bottom to get started
Are you sure you want to exit?Any unsaved progress will be lost.
Open a document to get startedCtrl+O
